title: Proactive Ambient Agent — Lane 3
consumer_purpose: Give the desktop app a sixth sense — proactive status indicators that surface git changes, test failures, outdated deps, PR activity, and session memory without interrupting flow
claim_atoms: Ambient context provider with watchers registry and polling
5 watcher modules (git, test, deps, pr-activity, session-memory)
Ambient status bar with auto-hide and slide-up animation
Ambient popover for detail view on click
All watchers gracefully handle unavailable data
content:
## Architecture

### Context Provider (ambient.tsx)
- Uses `createSimpleContext` pattern matching all other contexts
- Manages a registry of watchers, each returning status objects
- Watchers run on intervals (30s, 60s, 5min depending on type)
- Status types: "ok" | "info" | "warning" | "alert"
- Each status has: id, label, description, icon, severity, action, dismissible, timestamp
- Dismissed insights are tracked in a Set (session-only, not persisted)

### Watcher Modules (ambient/watchers/*.ts)
- Each watcher is a pure async function returning WatcherResult | null
- Git watcher: checks uncommitted/unpushed/merge-conflicts via IPC
- Test watcher: detects recently modified test files
- Deps watcher: checks for outdated dependencies
- PR watcher: checks for open PRs needing review
- Session memory: remembers recent work context

### Components
- `AmbientStatusBar`: Fixed bottom bar, shows watcher status dots, auto-hides after 30s idle
- `AmbientPopover`: Uses @opencode-ai/ui/popover, shows detail + action + dismiss

### Layout Integration
- Wrap content in `<AmbientProvider>` in layout.tsx
- Render `<AmbientStatusBar />` next to DebugBar
- Import in layout.tsx
